stats.note: Labeling time for automated pre-annotation is <1s. Manual researcher time estimated at 5-10min/hypothesis.

labeled_hypotheses.description: AMPK Metabolic Pathway may transitively_related_to mTOR Kinase Target via path: bio:pathway:ampk_pathway -> aligned_to -> chem:mechanism:ampk_activation -> inhibits -> chem:target:mtor_kinase
labeled_hypotheses.label: supported
labeled_hypotheses.evidence_summary: AMPK phosphorylates TSC2 and Raptor to inhibit mTORC1 kinase activity. 2024 reviews confirm this regulatory axis.

labeled_hypotheses.description: mTOR Signaling Pathway may transitively_related_to AMPK Activation Mechanism via path: bio:pathway:mtor_signaling -> regulates -> bio:pathway:ampk_pathway -> aligned_to -> chem:mechanism:ampk_activation
labeled_hypotheses.label: supported
labeled_hypotheses.evidence_summary: mTOR-AMPK crosstalk is well-established: mTOR suppresses AMPK and vice versa. Confirmed in 2024 mTOR signaling reviews.

labeled_hypotheses.description: mTOR Signaling Pathway may transitively_related_to mTOR Kinase Target via path: bio:pathway:mtor_signaling -> aligned_to -> chem:mechanism:mtor_inhibition -> targets -> chem:target:mtor_kinase
labeled_hypotheses.label: supported
labeled_hypotheses.evidence_summary: mTOR kinase is the catalytic core of mTOR signaling complex; direct relationship is definitional.

labeled_hypotheses.description: TNF-alpha Cytokine may transitively_related_to Breast Cancer via path: bio:protein:tnf_alpha -> activates -> bio:pathway:pi3k_akt -> promotes -> bio:disease:breast_cancer
labeled_hypotheses.label: partially_supported
labeled_hypotheses.evidence_summary: TNF-alpha promotes inflammation-driven breast cancer progression via NF-kB. 2024 reviews support role in tumor microenvironment.

labeled_hypotheses.description: HER2 Receptor may transitively_related_to Breast Cancer via path: bio:protein:her2 -> drives -> bio:pathway:pi3k_akt -> promotes -> bio:disease:breast_cancer
labeled_hypotheses.label: supported
labeled_hypotheses.evidence_summary: HER2+ breast cancer is a well-established clinical entity; HER2 overexpression drives tumor growth via PI3K-AKT.

labeled_hypotheses.description: BACE1 Protease may transitively_related_to Alzheimer's Disease via path: bio:protein:bace1 -> drives -> bio:pathway:amyloid_cascade -> causes -> bio:disease:alzheimers
labeled_hypotheses.label: supported
labeled_hypotheses.evidence_summary: BACE1 is the rate-limiting enzyme in amyloid precursor protein cleavage. Central to Alzheimer's amyloid hypothesis.

labeled_hypotheses.description: BACE1 Enzyme Target randomly linked to Amyloid Cascade Pathway via path: chem:target:bace1_enzyme -> is_target_of -> bio:protein:bace1 -> drives -> bio:pathway:amyloid_cascade
labeled_hypotheses.label: supported
labeled_hypotheses.evidence_summary: BACE1 enzyme target is directly upstream of amyloid cascade; random path captured a valid mechanistic link.

labeled_hypotheses.description: BACE1 Protease randomly linked to Alzheimer's Disease via path: bio:protein:bace1 -> drives -> bio:pathway:amyloid_cascade -> causes -> bio:disease:alzheimers
labeled_hypotheses.label: supported
labeled_hypotheses.evidence_summary: BACE1 is the rate-limiting enzyme in amyloid precursor protein cleavage. Central to Alzheimer's amyloid hypothesis.
